text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If we want to minimize rule violations, we need to
get to the bottom of the problem...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... But what can we do besides crack down on
everyone? Do we get on our knees and beg
them?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I could just talk with everyone more and
raise awareness?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Although... If there were fewer rules, maybe there
would be fewer violations. No, but then there
wouldn't be any discipline...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, might as well try everything! Anyway, it's
about time for b—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?! It's morning already?! What have I done?!
